response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering across multiple languages and domains, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with required technologies. However, his direct experience with GenAI-specific systems (e.g., vector databases, RAG, multi-agent frameworks) is not explicitly documented, and his background leans more toward general software development than applied GenAI solutions. His leadership in technical discovery sessions and customer-facing roles is unclear.
strengths: Strong background in software engineering with over 15 years of experience in production-grade systems
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Proven track record in full-stack development and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with GenAI-specific technologies (vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems)
No clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or customer-facing technical leadership
Lack of Master's/PhD in AI or related fields (only Bachelor's in Computer Science)

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and AI-agent infrastructure experience
